title: False advertising
doc_html:
§10.2.  False advertising

False advertising by banner, word-of-mouth, or otherwise is prohibited.

Added by Acts 1981, No. 918, §1, eff. Aug. 2, 1981.
doc_text:
§10.2.  False advertising
False advertising by banner, word-of-mouth, or otherwise is prohibited.
Added by Acts 1981, No. 918, §1, eff. Aug. 2, 1981.
